audience: students, designers, web developers, small teams
title: TalkTome (Web Chat)
summary: A responsive room-based web chat application built in pure HTML, CSS, and Vanilla JavaScript, powered by Firebase Realtime Database and Authentication with glassmorphism UI.
overview: TalkTome (formerly Teri Meri Baatein) is a real-time room-based web messaging platform. Developed using vanilla web technologies, it features custom welcome animations, floating action controllers, glassmorphic headers, message reply nodes, reactions, and responsive design for native-like mobile viewports.
longDescription: TalkTome is an outstanding reference project for web developers looking to master asynchronous state synchronization without heavy frameworks. Built using semantic HTML5, modern flexbox/grid layout modules, and pure Vanilla JavaScript, it integrates directly with Firebase Realtime Database for sub-second text message delivery and presence checks. The frontend features glassmorphism layouts with backdrop-filter styles, dynamic user counters, animated welcome screens, and detailed reaction controls. It stands as a production-grade demonstration of highly responsive, client-side single page messaging workflows.
features: Instant Real-Time Sync: Sub-second message delivery via Firebase Realtime Database listeners
Animated Intro Screens: Eye-catching fade-in transitions and welcoming graphics welcoming active users
Room Management Hub: High-performance room creation and joint controls via unique alphanumeric IDs
Dynamic Member Counter: Dynamic participant counting syncing active room members automatically
Glassmorphism Design: Beautiful backdrop-filter gradients and blurred overlays keeping layouts extremely modern
Contextual Message Reply: Touch-friendly long-press reply nodes connecting text references dynamically
Interactive Reactions: In-app reaction selector allowing members to tag messages with dynamic emojis
Mobile-First Scaling: Highly optimized CSS breakpoints offering native-app feel on mobile screens
Floating Action Triggers: Responsive footer inputs and floating action buttons keeping focus on messaging
Scroll Lock Management: Smart JS scroll locking keeping the message panel pinned to the latest text automatically
deliverables: Complete frontend source code (HTML, CSS, JS)
Deploy guidance sheet for Firebase Hosting
